summary: Completed testing of Campaign Image Fix and related features. All 13 backend tests passed. Campaign image endpoint now correctly returns binary WebP/JPEG data (not base64 text). Frontend loads correctly with company name visible. Marketing page and campaign history working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Campaign image fix verified - endpoint now uses base64.b64decode() to return proper binary image data. Key endpoints tested: GET /api/marketing/campaigns/{id}/image (WebP), GET /api/marketing/campaigns/{id}/image?fmt=jpg (JPEG), GET /api/items/{id}/image?fmt=jpg (JPEG), GET /api/ledger-pdf/{token} (404 for invalid). All 4 background tasks running: daily_reminder, backup, greeting, monthly_ledger. PWA icons accessible at /icons/icon-192.png, /icons/icon-512.png, /mr-icon-192.png, /mr-icon-512.png.

Campaign Image Endpoint (Key Fix).GET /api/marketing/campaigns/{id}/image: PASS - Returns RIFF header (proper WebP binary)
Campaign Image Endpoint (Key Fix).GET /api/marketing/campaigns/{id}/image?: PASS - Returns FFD8FF header (proper JPEG binary)
